title: Don't set filesystem_cache_boundary_alignment too high
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce
### How to reproduce
With these settings:
```xml
<remote_servers>
<cluster0>
<shard>
<replica>
<host>node1</host>
<port>9000</port>
</replica>
</shard>
<shard>
<replica>
<host>node2</host>
<port>9000</port>
</replica>
</shard>
</cluster0>
</remote_servers>
<filesystem_caches>
<fcache0>
<max_size>1Ki</max_size>
<path>/var/lib/clickhouse/fcache0/</path>
</fcache0>
</filesystem_caches>
```
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int, c1 String) ENGINE = IcebergS3(s3, filename = 't0/', format = 'CSV');
CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 Int, c1 Array(String)) ENGINE = Distributed('cluster0', default, t0);
REPLACE TABLE t1 (c0 String, c1 Int) ENGINE = S3(s3, filename = 't1/', format = 'CSV');
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW v0 TO t0 (c1 Int, c0 String) AS (SELECT 1 c0, 'a' c1 FROM t1);
INSERT INTO TABLE t1 (c0, c1) SETTINGS filesystem_cache_boundary_alignment = 18446744073709551615, filesystem_cache_name = 'fcache0' VALUES (1, 1);
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'size <= aligned_size'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. src/Common/StackTrace.cpp:389: StackTrace::StackTrace() @ 0x000000001432da64
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:56: DB::abortOnFailedAssertion(String const&) @ 0x0000000014287315
2. src/Interpreters/Cache/FileCache.cpp:415: DB::FileCache::splitRange(unsigned long, unsigned long, unsigned long) @ 0x000000001b5f308f
3. src/Interpreters/Cache/FileCache.cpp:775: DB::FileCache::getOrSet(DB::FileCacheKey const&, unsigned long, unsigned long, unsigned long, DB::CreateFileSegmentSettings const&, unsigned long, DB::FileCacheUserInfo const&, std::optional<unsigned long>) @ 0x000000001b5f4bf4
4. src/Disks/IO/CachedOnDiskReadBufferFromFile.cpp:146: DB::CachedOnDiskReadBufferFromFile::nextFileSegmentsBatch() @ 0x00000000197cbbd2
5. src/Disks/IO/CachedOnDiskReadBufferFromFile.cpp:165: DB::CachedOnDiskReadBufferFromFile::initialize() @ 0x00000000197cbe30
6. src/Disks/IO/CachedOnDiskReadBufferFromFile.cpp:1357: DB::CachedOnDiskReadBufferFromFile::isContentCached(unsigned long, unsigned long) @ 0x00000000197d93b1
7. src/Disks/IO/ThreadPoolRemoteFSReader.cpp:94: DB::ThreadPoolRemoteFSReader::submit(DB::IAsynchronousReader::Request) @ 0x00000000196466b3
8. src/Disks/IO/AsynchronousBoundedReadBuffer.cpp:114: DB::AsynchronousBoundedReadBuffer::readAsync(char*, unsigned long, Priority) @ 0x00000000197c6b88
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c0 SMALLINT, c1 INT, c2 TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t3 (c0 BIGINT, c1 REAL);
INSERT INTO t2 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, NULL, 'test');
SELECT c0, c1 FROM t2 WHERE c1 IS NULL;
